citation.title: Artificial Intelligence Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0)
citation.author: National Institute of Standards and Technology
citation.publisher: U.S. Department of Commerce, National Institute of Standards and Technology
citation.description: The NIST AI Risk Management Framework (AI RMF 1.0) provides a structured approach for organizations to manage risks associated with AI systems throughout their lifecycle. It is organized around four core functions: GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, and MANAGE, with 19 categories and 70 subcategories that describe specific outcomes for trustworthy AI risk management.

strm_usage.extraction_method: Manual extraction of subcategory outcome statements from NIST AI 100-1 framework document. Built from training knowledge of the published framework. Competency implications authored independently to avoid circular scoring (per ISSUE #60).
strm_usage.note: NIST AI 100-1 is a US Government work and is not subject to copyright protection in the United States (17 U.S.C. 105).
